tasks.title: T1 — Centralize XDG path resolution in `plugin/src/utils/project-id.ts`. Add `getDataHome()`, namespace guard helpers, and `getWorktreeBase(projectId)` preserving sibling layout under `opencode/worktree/{pid}`. Refactor `getExternalRoot()` to use `getDataHome()` so relative `XDG_DATA_HOME` handling is shared. Add tests for set/unset/empty/relative XDG paths and namespace guard behavior. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added shared `getDataHome()`, `getWorktreeBase(projectId)`, `isPathInsideDirectory()`, and `assertPathInsideDirectory()` helpers in `plugin/src/utils/project-id.ts`. Refactored `getExternalRoot()` to share `getDataHome()` and reject relative `XDG_DATA_HOME`. Added tests for set/unset/empty/relative XDG paths, worktree base resolution, and namespace guard behavior. Verification: `pnpm test -- src/utils/project-id.test.ts` passed; `pnpm run typecheck` passed. Checkpoint commit: af8b51a7afdc7a14e26a2f9112f52c79c15f35d8.

error_recovery.next_strategy: Continue using shell for verification if ADV evidence tools keep failing; record summaries in task notes/checkpoints.

tasks.completed_by: Completed T1. `adv_run_test` and `adv_task_evidence` currently fail with TypeError, so RED/GREEN evidence was captured through shell output and summarized in checkpoint verification.

tasks.title: T2 — Add `ProjectPaths.reflections` and remove physical `ProjectPaths.db` allocation in `plugin/src/storage/json.ts`. Keep `db_dir` accepted as deprecated config compatibility if needed. Update path tests and any fixtures that currently expect `paths.db`. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.

Updated storage path tests to assert no `db` property and flat reflections path. Verification: RED path assertions failed before implementation; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/storage/json.test.ts` passed 63 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed. Checkpoint commit: 945f6a80b0919086f8a68a658d80c3e392513128.

tasks.completed_by: Completed T2. Evidence recorded through shell/checkpoint due ADV evidence tool instability.

tasks.title: T3 — Refactor worktree path callers to use centralized XDG helpers. Replace hardcoded `os.homedir()/.local/share` path construction in `tools/worktree/state.ts`, `tools/worktree/index.ts`, and `tools/worktree/migration.ts`. Preserve current sibling layout and legacy worktree SQLite migration semantics unless tests prove dead. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Refactored `tools/worktree/state.ts` to use `getWorktreeBase(projectId)` and `getExternalRoot(projectId)` for marker paths. Refactored `tools/worktree/migration.ts` to use `getExternalRoot()` and `getDataHome()` instead of hardcoded homedir paths, preserving legacy SQLite layout under the data home. Refactored `tools/worktree/index.ts` workspace/delegations path construction to use `getDataHome()`. Added XDG behavior tests. Verification: RED focused tests failed before implementation; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/state-session-lifecycle.test.ts src/tools/worktree/migration.test.ts` passed 12 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed; related scan found no `homedir`/`.local/share` construction under `plugin/src/tools/worktree`. Checkpoint commit: 4b4d6d193b80d85ac94fa47a33d9c2c42f5a84db.
tasks.completed_by: Completed T3. Worktree path callers now route through centralized XDG helpers.

tasks.title: T4 — Implement bounded empty-parent reaping after successful worktree removal. Add helper that `rmdir`s empty branch-prefix parents up to, but not including, `getWorktreeBase(projectId)`. Stop on non-empty parent, permission error, or path escape; never recursive-delete. Tests: `change/foo` parent removed, sibling `change/bar` preserved, stop-root preserved, escape rejected. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: delegate_allowed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `reapEmptyWorktreeParents()` using bounded `rmdir` only. It removes empty branch-prefix parents up to but not including `getWorktreeBase(projectId)`, stops on non-empty parents, preserves base, and rejects path escape. Wired successful `advWorktreeDelete()` to call cleanup after registry removal, while logging/skipping if a custom/legacy worktree path is outside the canonical base. Tests cover empty parent removal, sibling preservation, base preservation, and escape rejection. Verification: RED missing helper failures; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts` passed 8 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed. Checkpoint commit: 68eef9c6cbf7fd097dbb5cc0b0c5fe89932281b1.
tasks.completed_by: Completed T4. Helper rejects escape in direct unit test; delete flow catches escape and skips cleanup so legacy/custom worktree locations still delete successfully.

tasks.title: T6 — Canonicalize archived change listing by `change.json.id`. Update archive read/list logic so bundle directory names like `{date}-{changeId}` do not produce duplicate archived entries when canonical IDs match. Add tests for canonical de-dupe and status/list output stability. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added archive-list regression test for simultaneous canonical `archive/<id>/` and dated `archive/{date}-{id}/` bundle directories with the same `change.json.id`. Updated `listResolvedChanges()` to deduplicate loaded changes by canonical `change.id`, preferring terminal-status records if duplicates differ. Verification: RED duplicate assertion failed; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/storage/store-temporal.test.ts` passed 48 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed. Checkpoint commit: 0da146e09f92de81219904592064278b08decaa7.

tasks.title: T5 — Fix reflection storage location and migration. Update `storage/reflection.ts` / `tools/reflection.ts` to write/read `{external}/reflections.jsonl` via `ProjectPaths.reflections`, migrate or tolerate legacy `{external}/.adv/reflections.jsonl` without re-creating nested `.adv/`, and add tests proving flat path wins and legacy path is not expanded. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated reflection persistence to pass `store.paths.reflections`, so external state writes to flat `{external}/reflections.jsonl`. Added readable-path fallback that tolerates legacy `{external}/.adv/reflections.jsonl` when flat override is missing, while flat path wins if both exist and append with flat override does not create nested `.adv`. Verification: RED legacy fallback test failed; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/storage/reflection.test.ts` passed 15 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed. Checkpoint commit: a00d934298f3a1bcdfdc0ca081c91330fee5b925.

tasks.title: T7 — Add dry-run ADV hygiene reporting for leaked external-state artifacts. Report nested `.adv/`, stale physical `db/`, empty worktree branch-prefix dirs, and synthetic test project/worktree dirs. Exclude `worker.lock` / `worker.lock.releasing`; no deletion without explicit approval. Wire into `adv_status view:hygiene` or existing hygiene surface with tests. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `external_state_hygiene` to `adv_status view:hygiene`, reporting dry-run-only external-state artifacts: nested external `.adv/`, stale physical `db/`, synthetic test project/worktree dirs, and empty worktree branch-prefix dirs. Report explicitly marks deletion as approval-required and worker locks as excluded. Added status hygiene test for all report fields. Verification: `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/status.test.ts` passed 22 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed; targeted Prettier check passed. Checkpoint commit: 543be2516d2e325e45c9fa811572bd898ba25111.

tasks.completed_by: Completed T7. TDD caveat: test and implementation were batched before a separate red run was captured; verification is green-only for this task.

tasks.title: T8 — Add test-run cleanup guard for synthetic ADV state/worktree leaks. Introduce `vitest` global setup/teardown or shared test utility that owns only this run's synthetic project IDs/worktree dirs, cleans them after tests, and never touches real project IDs. Add regression tests or harness checks for ownership markers and safe no-op behavior. TDD intent: inline. Delegation hint: inline_required.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added Vitest global setup/teardown plus synthetic cleanup utility. Global setup snapshots existing synthetic ADV project/worktree dirs under XDG data home and removes only new synthetic dirs after the run. Cleanup skips non-synthetic real project IDs and skips synthetic dirs with mismatched `.adv-test-owner` marker. Added regression tests for baseline-preserving cleanup and marker mismatch no-op. Verification: RED missing utility module; GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/__tests__/synthetic-cleanup.test.ts` passed 2 tests; `pnpm run typecheck` passed; targeted Prettier check passed. Checkpoint commit: 14de24300684c2a0006745c3f20d845d14d9bc39.

TDD intent: not_applicable (docs/script text). Delegation hint: delegate_allowed.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated AGENTS, ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, SETUP, and project context to describe flat `reflections.jsonl`, Temporal-only runtime state, deprecated `db_dir`, XDG-aware worktree base, and dry-run/approval cleanup boundary. Replaced `scripts/recover-db.js` with a retired no-deletion guidance stub. Verification: `node scripts/recover-db.js` prints retired guidance; `node --check scripts/recover-db.js` passes. Checkpoint commit: 1834dfe28ffb2e711a6f7ce25e0f825cf99b3f06.

wisdom.content: ADV evidence tools can transiently TypeError while recording TDD evidence (`evidenceResult?.task.tdd_phase`, `task.tdd_evidence`), but checkpoint/task update may still persist evidence. When this happens, run the same command via shell, include exact command/exit summary in checkpoint verification, and proceed only after green verification passes.

Use `pnpm exec vitest run <file>` for focused Vitest verification in this repo. `pnpm test -- <file>` can behave like a broader suite run and surface unrelated test failures, which obscures task-local red/green evidence.

For safe worktree branch-prefix cleanup, expose a small bounded helper that uses `rmdir` only, stops at canonical base, and throws on namespace escape. Call sites that may receive custom/legacy paths should catch escape and skip cleanup, preserving the primary delete operation while direct helper tests enforce the safety invariant.

Archive listing must treat `change.json.id` as canonical identity, not archive directory names. When combining Temporal, source-dir, and archive-dir sources, deduplicate loaded `Change` records by `change.id` and prefer terminal statuses to avoid duplicate archived entries from dated bundle dirs.

For external-state file relocations, pass the explicit `ProjectPaths.<file>` path at write call sites, and keep read-only fallback to legacy nested `.adv/<file>` only when the flat override is missing. This preserves compatibility without re-creating nested `.adv` directories.

Status hygiene findings that imply deletion must be reported as dry-run-only with `deletion_requires_approval: true`. Exclude worker lock lifecycle artifacts from generic cleanup reports when another change owns that behavior.

For test-run cleanup of ADV external state, snapshot synthetic project/worktree dirs before Vitest and delete only newly-created synthetic dirs at teardown. Keep real project IDs untouched, and honor `.adv-test-owner` marker mismatches as a no-op guard.

Running Prettier over legacy top-level markdown (`ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md`, `SETUP.md`, `project.md`) can cause broad unrelated reflow. For docs-refresh tasks, avoid committing formatting-only churn unless the repo check explicitly requires it; keep targeted diffs.

Final verification for this change passed with `pnpm run check`, full `pnpm test`, and `pnpm run build`. Focused related scans should classify remaining hardcoded path matches rather than blindly eliminating defaults/tests/docs that intentionally document legacy or fallback behavior.

proposal.notes: Problem statement confirmed by user. Proposal covers 7 of 8 findings (F6 explicitly out of scope; owned by fixZombieWorkerLockTemporal). Discovery agenda captures 7 deferred unknowns. B/F/S scan: all clear.

design.notes: Design completed. Validator verdict: CAUTION. Caution resolved inline by explicitly requiring getExternalRoot() to use shared getDataHome() so existing external-state paths gain relative-XDG rejection. No unresolved CONFLICT, no user-value tradeoff, no contract-compromise risk.

clarify_findings.message: Success criteria are placeholder or empty. What measurable outcomes define done?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
